criteriaResults.evidence: meta-tests/test-edge-cases.bats exists (303 lines), has shebang '#!/usr/bin/env bats' at line 1, loads helper via "load 'helpers/test-helper'" at line 5.
bats meta-tests/test-edge-cases.bats exits 0. All 21 tests pass: '1..21' with every test 'ok'. No failures.
bash meta-tests/run.sh exits 0. All 132 tests pass. Summary line: 'Meta-tests completed in 11s (exit code: 0)'.
grep -c '@test ' reports 21 test blocks in test-edge-cases.bats, exceeding the minimum threshold of 15.
Test at line 31: 'slugify: string containing only special characters returns empty string' passes '!@#$%^&*()' to slugify and asserts output == '' and status == 0.
Test at line 37: 'slugify: string containing only spaces returns empty string' passes '     ' (5 spaces) to slugify and asserts output == '' and status == 0.
Test at line 72: 'json_read: binary file does not crash and returns empty string' creates binary file with printf '\x00\x01\x02\x03\x04\x05', calls json_read, asserts status == 0 and output == ''.
Test at line 79: 'json_read: truncated JSON returns empty string without crashing' creates file with '{"name": ' (incomplete JSON), calls json_read with '.name', asserts status == 0 and output == ''.
Test at line 86: 'json_read: deeply nested path returns correct value' creates 5-level nested JSON (.a.b.c.d.e = 'deep-value'), calls json_read with '.a.b.c.d.e', asserts output == 'deep-value'.

Test at line 123 covers double quotes and single quotes in one prompt. Test at line 155 covers backslashes separately. Both verify jq -e returns 0 (valid JSON) and userPrompt contains the original text. Combined coverage satisfies the criterion.

Test at line 137: 'init_harness_state: prompt with newlines produces valid JSON' uses $'Build an app\nwith multiple\nlines', asserts jq -e . returns 0 and userPrompt field preserves all three line segments.

Test at line 172: 'update_handoff: called before init_harness_state creates handoff.json from scratch' removes handoff.json, calls update_handoff, asserts file exists with completedSprints, currentSprint, git.harnessBranch, git.latestTag, git.latestMergeSha fields.

Test at line 198: 'update_regression_registry: malformed contract JSON does not crash and preserves registry' pre-seeds valid registry, writes 'not json at all' as contract, calls update_regression_registry, verifies registry.json is still parseable by jq -e.

Test at line 217: 'git_create_sprint_branch: fails gracefully when harness branch does not exist' calls with 'harness/nonexistent-branch', asserts exit_code != 0 and verifies no orphan branch was created via git branch --list.
Test at line 239: 'on-generator-stop: multiple sprint directories with mixed statuses picks active one and blocks' creates sprint-01/pass + sprint-02/active, runs hook, asserts exit code == 2.

Test at line 252: 'on-generator-stop: hooks work from working directory with harness-state at expected relative path' sets up harness-state/ at expected relative path in TEST_TEMP_DIR, runs hook from that directory, verifies exit 0.

Test at line 264: 'on-stop: sprint-plan exists but no sprint directories at all allows exit' installs sprint-plan-3sprint.json fixture but creates no sprint directories, runs on-stop.sh, asserts exit 0.

Test at line 275: 'log_cost: non-JSON output_json argument does not crash and defaults to 0 tokens' passes 'this is not json' as third arg, verifies cost-log.json exists and invocations[0].inputTokens == 0, outputTokens == 0.

Test at line 293: 'update_progress: works when sprint-plan.json is missing' creates progress.md but no sprint-plan.json, calls update_progress, verifies no crash and 'Sprint 01' + 'PASS' appended to progress.md.
run.sh output ends with 'Meta-tests completed in 11s (exit code: 0)' matching expected 'Meta-tests completed in' format with duration and exit code.
bash meta-tests/run.sh --filter 'slugify' exits 0, outputs 14 slugify-matching tests. grep -c 'sprint_pad' on filtered output returns 0. Filter correctly limits execution.

setup() at lines 8-25 creates TEST_TEMP_DIR via mktemp -d, cd's into it, sets HARNESS_STATE='harness-state' relative to temp dir. All tests operate under $TEST_TEMP_DIR. Only reference to literal 'harness-state/' is in a comment (line 253). No test writes to the project's actual harness-state/ directory.

All 21 test names follow 'function_or_module: description' pattern. Examples: 'slugify: string containing only special characters returns empty string', 'json_read: binary file does not crash', 'on-generator-stop: multiple sprint directories with mixed statuses picks active one and blocks', 'log_cost: non-JSON output_json argument does not crash and defaults to 0 tokens'.

All error/edge tests verify both exit status AND output/state: slugify tests assert status==0 + output==''; json_read tests assert status==0 + output==''; git_create_sprint_branch asserts exit_code!=0 + no orphan branch; log_cost asserts file exists + field values==0; registry test asserts function completes + registry remains valid JSON.
Total @test count: test-edge-cases(21) + test-git(25) + test-hooks(28) + test-infrastructure(8) + test-utils-pure(26) + test-utils-state(24) = 132. Threshold >= 80.

regressionResults.evidence: Full suite via 'bash meta-tests/run.sh' ran all 132 tests across 6 .bats files. All sprint 1-5 tests continue to pass: test-infrastructure(8/8), test-utils-pure(26/26), test-utils-state(24/24), test-git(25/25), test-hooks(28/28). Zero regressions.

correctness.notes: All 132 tests pass with zero failures. All 21 new edge case tests pass. No regressions across any prior sprint.

robustness.notes: Edge cases thoroughly tested: binary files, truncated JSON, special characters, newlines, backslashes, missing prerequisites, malformed data, non-existent branches. Tests verify graceful degradation. Minor: C6-10 splits quotes and backslashes into separate tests rather than combining.

codeQuality.notes: Consistent naming convention, proper test isolation via setup(), clear section headers, focused single-purpose tests. Good reuse of test-helper infrastructure (install_fixture, assert_json_field, init_test_repo, source_harness_lib, run_hook).

completeness.notes: All 25 contract criteria satisfied. Tests cover 9 distinct functions/modules. 132 total tests well above the 80 threshold. Edge cases span the full harness: utils, state, git, hooks.

ux.notes: run.sh provides clear summary with timing and exit code. --filter flag works correctly for selective execution. TAP output for CI pipelines. Descriptive test names make failures immediately actionable.

summary: Sprint 6 PASS. All 25 criteria met. 21 edge case tests added covering boundary conditions across all harness modules: slugify (special chars, spaces, empty, unicode, max length), json_read (binary, truncated, deeply nested, whitespace), init_harness_state (quotes, newlines, backslashes), update_handoff (cold start), registry (malformed JSON), git (non-existent branch), hooks (mixed statuses, relative paths, missing directories), log_cost (non-JSON input), update_progress (missing plan). Full regression suite of 132 tests passes with zero regressions from sprints 1-5. Primary score 9.2/10.
